name: What's the difference between confidential and AEO?
description: **Confidential: parties OK; AEO: attorneys only.** For trade secrets.[2]

mainEntity.name: What's the difference between confidential and AEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: **Confidential: parties OK; AEO: attorneys only.** For trade secrets.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Confidential allows party access under limits; AEO restricts to attorneys only.** AEO for highest sensitivity like trade secrets.[2] Key factors: Overuse of either sanctionable.[1] Protective orders define tiers. Challenge escalations. Use least restrictive needed. Review order language carefully.
